# CHINAPAL / China Piece Auto

CHINAPAL is a Casablanca-based specialist for compatible parts for Chinese cars in Morocco.

Important pages:
- https://chinapieceauto.com/
- https://chinapieceauto.com/boutique
- https://chinapieceauto.com/vehicule
- https://chinapieceauto.com/verification-vin
- https://chinapieceauto.com/garages-carrosseries
- https://chinapieceauto.com/pieces-voitures-chinoises/casablanca

Commercial policy:
- Prices are confirmed on request after VIN/photo/reference verification.
- Compatibility may vary by year, trim, import market, facelift, connector, side, options, or VIN.
- CHINAPAL does not invent OEM references, stock status, or universal fitment claims.

Contact:
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/212650542999
- Service area: Morocco, based in Casablanca.
